articles.title: Paxos Says Its Prepared To Vigorously Litigate Over SEC’s Wells Notice
articles.description: BUSD issuer Paxos has categorically disagreed with the allegations by the SEC. The firm's press release indicated vigorous litigation in this matter if necessary.

articles.title: Paxos ‘categorically disagrees’ with SEC in calling BUSD a security
articles.description: Paxos doesn't think stablecoin Binance USD (BUSD) should be considered a security. The company confirmed it got an SEC Wells notice regarding its issuance of BUSD.

articles.title: Coinbase Willing To Fight For Its Staking Program, CEO Says
articles.description: Crypto exchange Coinbase (COIN) CEO Brian Armstrong recently denied that the company’s staking services are a security under U.S. regulations. The company claims that it is willing to defend its product “in court if necessary.” Related Reading: Polygon Bearish Signal: Whale Deposits $5.2M In MATIC To Binance Following the recent feud between Kraken and the […]

articles.title: BUSD is dead, long live USDT
articles.description: Paxos has announced that it will no longer issue Binance USD after an order from the New York Department of Financial Services.

articles.title: Aave To Freeze BUSD Reserves On Ethereum
articles.description: Summary: Aave community member Marc Zeller proposed halting the BUSD lending market on Ethereum. Zeller argued that the Paxos-issued stablecoin was bound to decline in supply and inability to mint new tokens would affect peg arbitrage opportunities. The proposal was submitted shortly after U.S. regulators ordered Paxos to halt minting new BUSD coins and teased a lawsuit against the regulated...

articles.title: Shiba Inu (SHIB) Extremely Unprofitable, On-Chain Data Shows, Here's What It Means for Asset
articles.description: Meme token rapidly lost large part of its value, which led to plunge in asset's profitability

articles.title: Paxos Terminates Partnership with Binance, Stops Minting BUSD
articles.description: Paxos ends relationship with Binance for BUSD stablecoin. BUSD continues to be fully supported & backed 1:1 with US dollar reserves. Customers can redeem funds in USD or convert to Pax Dollar (USDP). Paxos remains committed to providing secure blockchain solutions to global enterprises. The post Paxos Terminates Partnership with Binance, Stops Minting BUSD appeared first on BeInCrypto.

articles.title: SEC lawsuit against Paxos over BUSD baffles crypto community
articles.description: Members of the community were confused and argued that people buying the stablecoin were not expecting it to go up in value.

articles.title: Binance sticking with BUSD for now, ready to explore options
articles.description: Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao said the exchange is ready to make adjustments and potentially move away from using BUSD as its main trading pair.

articles.title: Paxos to Stop Issuing Dollar-Pegged Token BUSD
articles.description: Industry-leading stablecoin issuer is having some problems

articles.title: Breaking: Paxos reportedly ordered to stop issuing Binance USD
articles.description: A New York regulator ordered Paxos to stop issuing BUSD, the third-largest stablecoin by market cap.
